creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
A note before doing the exp-run:  a few ports do not build or install their info pages right now

avr-gcc-5.4.0_2.log:ls: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/avr-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/info/cpp.info*: No such file or directory
